title: 3 Unusual Facts About Your Mind

segments.text: Your brain generates about 20 watts of power when awake.
But there's more to it than just that.
Your mind can store up to 2.5 petabytes of information.
And your thoughts can affect your physical health.
Can you really harness the power of your mind?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Discover the power of your own mind! Follow for daily facts! 🧠
